raw_consumer_statement:
Fraudulent Charge on Citibank Credit Card - Request for Assistance I traveled to XXXX from XX/XX/2024, to XX/XX/2024. During my trip, on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX, 2024, there were several fraudulent charges on my Citibank credit card. 

Upon returning from XXXX, I formally filed a complaint with Citibank and reported these transactions as fraudulent. 

Today, I called Citibank, and they denied my fraud claim, holding me accountable for these transactions, which I did not make. The total amount in question is approximately {$1000.00}. 

I kindly request your assistance in resolving this matter with Citibank as soon as possible. I have attached my transaction statement highlighting all the fraudulent charges.
